name: Zodiac Gold Inc.
description: Zodiac Gold Inc. is a West African-focused gold exploration company advancing the Todi Gold Project in Liberia, a 2,316 km² land package in an underexplored, politically stable mining jurisdiction. The company recently made a discovery at the Arthington target and is drilling at the Ben Ben target following a C$5.5 million financing completed in early 2026. Zodiac Gold is at the early exploration stage, expanding its resource base in an emerging district with significant bulk-tonnage gold potential.
